name: goal-convergence
description: Reports rolling-window convergence stats for /goal runs from .claude/state/goal-history.jsonl: counts of converged/spun/aborted plus avg turn_count. Emits a single statusline line every 60s.
command: while true; do f=.claude/state/goal-history.jsonl; if [ -f "$f" ]; then stats=$(awk -F'"' 'BEGIN{c=0;s=0;a=0;t=0;n=0} /"status":"converged"/{c++} /"status":"spun"/{s++} /"status":"aborted"/{a++} /"turn_count":/{for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) if($i=="turn_count"){match($(i+1),/[0-9]+/);if(RSTART){v=substr($(i+1),RSTART,RLENGTH)+0;t+=v;n++}}} END{total=c+s+a; if(total==0){print "no /goal runs yet"} else {avg=(n>0)?int(t/n+0.5):0; printf "last %d /goal: %d\u2713 %d\u21bb %d\u2717 avg %dt", total, c, s, a, avg}}' "$f" | tail -10000); echo "$stats"; else echo "no /goal history"; fi; sleep 60; done
